name: shoerack
description: Full-stack e-commerce website for selling shoes

scripts.install-deps: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.start: npm run seed && npm run dev
scripts.setup: npm run install-deps && npm run seed
scripts.sync-start: npm run install-deps && npm run seed && npm run dev
scripts.check-sync: cd backend && node -e "console.log('✅ Sync dependencies ready')"
scripts.check-products: cd backend && node -e "const mongoose = require('mongoose'); require('dotenv').config(); const Product = require('./models/Product'); mongoose.connect(process.env.MONGODB_URI).then(async () => { const count = await Product.countDocuments(); console.log(`Total products: ${count}`); process.exit(); });"
